# CAT Engine

A custom made 2 Dimentional Isometrical Game Engine. 

<!-- Logo Soon™ -->

CAT Engine stands for `Clearly A Terrible Engine`

## Features

CAT Engine comes with (but is not limite to) :

- A 2D Isometric rendering engine built with C# on top of [`monogame's`](https://monogame.net/) framework.
- An Input manager to register, modify and listen to keybind events
- Debugging tools

## Documentation

You can find all the documentation for CAT Engine in [`/Docs/`](/Docs/README.md) !

## Contributing

Contributions are always welcome!

See [`contributing.md`](/Docs/CONTRIBUTING.md) for ways to get started.

> [!NOTE]
> In no way CAT Engine is meant to be a fully working and optimized game engine. This is a passion project and issues are to be expected from this learning experience.
> As previously stated: contributions and suggestions are more than welcome!
